# Quanta Services

Quanta Services is a large field-execution platform spanning utility infrastructure, substation work, transmission-adjacent construction, and electrical delivery programs that matter when AI or modular sites need real energization pathways rather than abstract power plans.

## Why it matters
- Adds a real bridge between utility-side work and site-side electrical delivery.
- Makes interconnection, substation, and energization pathways feel less theoretical.
- Strengthens the graph where packaged power still needs utility-facing execution and field turnover.

## Best fit
- Large programs where utility coordination and field execution are both critical.
- Sites with substation, interconnection, or major electrical-yard scope.
- Modular or phased deployments where energization sequencing matters as much as equipment selection.

## Operational role in the graph
- Strengthens `electrical-integration-services`, `epc-and-commissioning`, and `site-selection-and-land-strategy`.
- Pulls `modular-substations`, `power-and-electrical`, and energization-adjacent turnover into a more believable chain.
- Helps the graph connect utility access, field construction, and operational handoff.
